---
title: 'Smash Burger @ Las Colinas'
date: '2015-02-22T21:37:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5580877675349124703'
blogger_filename: '/2015/02/smash-burger-las-colinas.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
  - 'Food'
---

<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0216151355-731844-964acdb704db.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="" border="0" height="300" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6118777622399298946" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0216151355-731844-8a6f373c503a.jpg" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><b>SmashBurger Spicy Jalepeno Burger</b></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<h2 style="text-align: left;">
 </h2>
<h2 style="text-align: left;">
&nbsp;</h2>
<h2 style="text-align: left;">
Smash Burger</h2>
<h3>
<a href="http://locations.smashburger.com/us/tx/irving/1372?q=76052&amp;loc=Haslet%2C+TX+76052&amp;t=" title="Las Colinas">Las Colinas</a>&nbsp;</h3>
Tel: 214-302-2681<br />
<div class="street-address">
975 West John Carpenter Freeway</div>
<div class="last">
Irving, TX 75039</div>
<br />
<br />
This one is going on my "Best Burgers" list!<br />
<br />
<h4>
Overview</h4>
<br />
The actual building has a Chipotle feel, in that there are menus up front to look at while you are in line, you walk to one side to the counter and order, then go find your seat. The building itself has the same type of set up and decor.<br />
<br />
You don't; however, build your own as in front you. You just order from the menu, they hand you a number, and they'll bring it out when it's ready. Soda selection is basic. Dr. Pepper is a must, and it's there!<br />
<br />
The burger was AWESOME! I got he <a href="http://smashburger.com/our-food/menu/" target="_blank">Spicy Jalepeno Baja Burger</a> and SmashFries.<br />
<br />
The SmashFries are tossed in OliveOil and Garlic.<br />
<br />
The Burger was topped with onions and guacamole, with slices of fresh raw Jalepeno. The bun was a a great sponge texture. <br />
<h4>
Cost</h4>
Burger, Drink, and Fries are A La Carte, (you buy each sperately). For two burgers, one fries, and one drink, it was about $19.00 <complete id="goog_759881920">+/-. </complete><br />
<br />
<h4>
Kids</h4>
Kids menu has burger, hot dog, or chicken strips (with fries and drink). <br />
<br />
<h4>
Tips to enjoy it better...</h4>
Don't get thrown off... the sign makes you think you are approaching a GameStop (same color and design to the sign). Look twice.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Final Thoughts</h4>
This was a good burger. Definitely one I will go back to, and definitely one that will be added to my list! <br />
<br />
This review is on <a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/smashburger-irving-2?hrid=zwq7iuUIf4z9pSXow4mCDw" target="_blank">Yelp </a>and Urban Spoon<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/1564080/restaurant/Smashburger-Irving"><img alt="Smashburger on Urbanspoon" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-d0e548e1e870.gif" style="border: none; height: 146px; width: 200px;" /></a> <br />
<br />
<br />
Twitter: <br />
<blockquote class="twitter-tweet" lang="en">
At <a href="https://twitter.com/hashtag/SmashBurger?src=hash">#SmashBurger</a>! <a href="http://t.co/JjZKqi1zLX">pic.twitter.com/JjZKqi1zLX</a><br />
â€” Darrell Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/status/567412240265924610">February 16, 2015</a></blockquote>
<script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js"></script> <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
<ul>
<li>New to the blog?&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li>Click&nbsp;<a href="http://eepurl.com/OjOcn" target="_blank">HERE to Subscribe</a>&nbsp;by email.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</h4>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
<div>
<b>What is YOUR favorite thing about Texas? Comment Below!</b></div>
<div>
<b><br /></b></div>
